product_overview: A public-facing immersive story reader and catalogue that presents published folk narratives with cinematic reading, chapter illustrations, AI TTS narration, and an on-page AI chat assistant. The site offers browsing, filtering, and a lightweight account experience for persistent reading progress.
core_goals: Discover and browse published stories via a searchable, filterable catalogue.
Read stories in a full-screen cinematic reader with per-chapter illustrations and persistent progress.
Listen to AI narration (TTS) and play embedded chapter audio while seeing a visualiser.
Interact with the on-page AI assistant to ask questions or get help while exploring the site.
Control visual theme (dark/light) and have that preference persist across visits and routes.

features.name: Landing Page Hero
features.description: A hero/banner on the homepage that introduces the product and guides visitors into the story catalogue.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero banner with title and description -> Scroll to trigger scroll progress bar animation -> Activate the primary CTA to navigate to /stories -> See story catalogue preview

features.name: Story Catalogue Marquee
features.description: An animated horizontal marquee on the landing page that continuously displays published story titles to pique discovery.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe animated marquee displaying published story titles

features.name: WiseEpu Chatbot
features.description: A floating AI chat assistant that opens a streaming chat panel for conversational help or story-related questions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the chatbot panel -> Type a message -> Submit the message -> Receive a streaming AI response in the panel -> Close the chat panel

features.name: Browse Story Catalogue
features.description: A paginated catalogue page where users can browse story cards, apply filters, and open a story for immersive reading.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> Browse story cards in a grid layout -> Use filtering or sorting controls to narrow stories -> Select a story card to open the immersive reader -> See story metadata and chapter list

features.name: Cinematic Story Reader
features.description: A full-screen immersive reader that shows story content, a chapter navigation sidebar, per-chapter illustrations, TTS narration, and inline audio playback with progress persistence.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> Select a story card to open the immersive reader -> View story title and chapter list in the sidebar -> Select a chapter in the sidebar to load its content -> See the chapter illustration for the active chapter -> Start TTS narration to play the chapter audio -> Pause TTS narration -> Use the inline audio player to play chapter audio -> Change chapter and observe reading progress is auto-saved

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: A site-wide dark/light mode toggle that persists the user's preference across pages and reloads.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> Toggle theme to switch between dark and light mode -> Refresh the page -> Observe the selected theme persists across routes including / and /archive

features.name: Archive Listings
features.description: An archive page listing all published stories for browsing and direct access to reader pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /archive -> Browse archive list of published stories -> Select a story link to open the immersive reader

features.name: Chapter Navigation
features.description: Sidebar-driven chapter list that lets readers switch chapters and updates the reader state accordingly.
user_flows: Open the immersive reader -> View chapter list in the sidebar -> Select a chapter entry to switch the active chapter -> Observe the reader updates to show the new chapter content and illustration -> Confirm the chapter title updates in the main content area

features.name: TTS Narration
features.description: AI-driven text-to-speech narration (ElevenLabs) with play/pause controls and a realtime visualiser while narration is active.
user_flows: Open the immersive reader -> Start TTS narration to play the chapter text -> Observe the audio visualiser animation while narrating -> Pause TTS narration mid-stream -> Resume TTS narration

features.name: Chapter Illustrations
features.description: Portrait-oriented illustration images that update to match the currently active chapter in the reader.
user_flows: Open the immersive reader -> View the illustration for the current chapter -> Switch to another chapter -> Observe the illustration update to the new chapter's image

routes.description: Landing page with hero section, marquee, story catalogue preview, and WiseEpu chatbot
Full story catalogue with filtering and browsing controls
Cinematic immersive reader for a specific story with chapter navigation, TTS, and illustrations
Archive listing of all published stories
User login page with email/password via Supabase Auth

features.name: Landing Page Hero
features.description: Hero section with animated scroll progress bar and CTA button linking to story catalogue
user_interactions: View hero banner with title and description
Scroll to trigger scroll progress bar animation
Click primary CTA to navigate to /stories

features.name: Story Catalogue Marquee
features.description: Animated horizontal marquee displaying published story titles on the landing page
user_interactions: View automatically scrolling marquee with story titles

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on stories table (published titles)

features.name: WiseEpu Chatbot
features.description: Floating AI chatbot trigger in the bottom-right corner that opens a chat panel with streaming responses
user_interactions: Click floating chatbot trigger button to open chat panel
Type a message in the input field
Submit message and receive streaming AI response
Close chat panel by clicking the close button

features.name: Browse Story Catalogue
features.description: Paginated catalogue page with story cards (cover, title, genre) and filtering controls
user_interactions: Browse story cards in a grid layout
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Use filtering or sorting controls to narrow stories

features.name: Cinematic Story Reader
features.description: Full-screen immersive reader with chapter navigation sidebar, illustrations, TTS narration, chapter audio, and reading progress persistence
user_interactions: View story title and chapter list in sidebar
Click a chapter in the sidebar to switch chapters
View chapter illustration image
Click TTS play/pause button to start/stop AI narration
Play chapter audio via the inline audio player
Reading progress auto-saved on chapter change

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on stories and chapters tables

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Dark/light mode toggle that persists via localStorage and applies across all routes
user_interactions: Click theme toggle button to switch between dark and light mode
Theme persists on page refresh
Theme applies consistently across all routes including /stories and reader

features.name: Archive Listings
features.description: Archive page showing all published stories in a list or grid format
user_interactions: Browse archive list of published stories
Click a story link to navigate to its reader page

features.name: Chapter Navigation
features.description: Sidebar chapter list in the reader that allows switching between chapters with state update
user_interactions: Click chapter entry in sidebar to switch active chapter
Reader updates to show new chapter content and illustration
Chapter title updates in the main content area

features.name: TTS Narration
features.description: AI text-to-speech narration using ElevenLabs with play/pause control and visualiser
user_interactions: Click TTS play button to start narration
Click pause button to stop narration mid-stream
View audio visualiser animation while narrating

features.name: Chapter Illustrations
features.description: Per-chapter illustration images that update when switching chapters in the reader
user_interactions: View illustration for the current chapter
Switch chapters and see illustration update to the new chapter's image

known_limitations.issue: TTS requires ElevenLabs API key in .env.local; will fail silently in environments without it
known_limitations.impact: TTS narration won't work without valid API key

known_limitations.issue: Chapter audio player requires audio_url to be set for each chapter in the database
known_limitations.impact: Audio player only renders if chapter has an audio_url; no audio = no player shown

known_limitations.issue: Reading progress persistence requires authenticated user; anonymous users progress is not saved
known_limitations.impact: Progress auto-save silently no-ops for unauthenticated users
